testcase.name: negative_mismatched_password_confirmation_does_not_allow_login_with_the_proposed_new_password
testcase.system-out: • Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated password change boundary preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Date of Birth • locator=input[data-test='dob'] • value=1990-01-01 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_icsedtcu6i@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@36LmbtDt ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Select option: Country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=NL ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=1011AB ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Autarboulevard ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: City • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Stroe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: State • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=Groningen ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Type into element: Email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_icsedtcu6i@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@36LmbtDt ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login • locator=button[data-test='login-submit'], input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/account/profile • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/account/profile • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /account/profile ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Get value from: Profile first name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_icsedtcu6i@example.com ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Type into element: Current password • locator=input[data-test='current-password'] • value=Aa1@36LmbtDt ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: New password • locator=input[data-test='new-password'] • value=Bb2@mismat0699Z ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Confirm new password • locator=input[data-test='new-password-confirm'] • value=Bb2@mismat0699ZMismatch ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Change password • locator=button[data-test='change-password-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/login • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/login • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/login ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: Email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_icsedtcu6i@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Bb2@mismat0699Z ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login • locator=button[data-test='login-submit'], input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: negative_valid_password_change_attempt_also_rejects_a_fresh_login_with_the_old_password
testcase.system-out: • Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated password change boundary preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: value=Autarboulevard ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: City • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Stroe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: State • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=Groningen ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Type into element: Email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_8kzktjmpm2@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@7zkNySuq ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login • locator=button[data-test='login-submit'], input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/account/profile • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/account/profile • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /account/profile ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Get value from: Profile first name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_8kzktjmpm2@example.com ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Value captured

testcase.name: positive_registered_user_profile_keeps_lookup_resolved_address
testcase.system-out: • Playwright pages after init: 1 ▶ Authenticated profile preconditions ▶ Clear browser session ✅ PASS: Session cleared ✅ PASS: Ready ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/auth/register • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/auth/register • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /auth/register ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Type into element: First name • locator=input[data-test='first-name'] • value=John ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Last name • locator=input[data-test='last-name'] • value=Doe ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Date of Birth • locator=input[data-test='dob'] • value=1990-01-01 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Phone • locator=input[data-test='phone'] • value=0712345678 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Email address • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ns0nldfkk9@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@PfVaGqod ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Select option: Country • locator=select[data-test='country'] • value=NL ✅ PASS: Selected ▶ Type into element: Postal code • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=1011AB ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: House number • locator=input[data-test='house_number'] • value=1 ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Get value from: Registration street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Autarboulevard ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Registration city • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Stroe ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Registration state • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=Groningen ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Click on: Register • locator=button[data-test='register-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Type into element: Email • locator=input[data-test='email'] • value=user_ns0nldfkk9@example.com ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Type into element: Password • locator=input[data-test='password'] • value=Aa1@PfVaGqod ✅ PASS: Typed ▶ Click on: Login • locator=button[data-test='login-submit'], input[data-test='login-submit'] ✅ PASS: Clicked ▶ Navigate to URL: https://practicesoftwaretesting.com/account/profile • base.url=https://practicesoftwaretesting.com • relativePath=/account/profile • Playwright pages after open: 1 • Wait for URL contains: /account/profile ✅ PASS: Navigated ▶ Get value from: Profile street • locator=input[data-test='street'] • value=Autarboulevard ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile city • locator=input[data-test='city'] • value=Stroe ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile state • locator=input[data-test='state'] • value=Groningen ✅ PASS: Value captured ▶ Get value from: Profile postal • locator=input[data-test='postal_code'] • value=1011AB ✅ PASS:
